usage: run_vsr [-help] [-log_file <string>] [-no_taper_to_pinwidth] [-post_load_script <string>] [-pre_load_script <string>] [-remove_existing_route] [-route_type_order {bus diffPair match nets shield}] [-run_VSR_Script <string>] [-share_shields] [-sel_net <string> | -incl_net_type {bus diffPair match nets shield} | -nets_file <string>]

options.name: -incl_net_type
options.description: {bus diffPair match nets shield} List of net types for VSR router to route.

options.name: -nets_file
options.description: FileName for nets to be routed

options.name: -no_taper_to_pinwidth
options.description: Used to switchoff the default taper pin width feature

options.name: -post_load_script
options.description: Script to be executed by VSR after loading the design

options.name: -pre_load_script
options.description: Script to be executed by VSR before loading the design

options.name: -remove_existing_route
options.description: All selected nets (fixed, normal), including shield, excluding power nets, will be deleted before the route

options.name: -route_type_order
options.description: {bus diffPair match nets shield} List of valid constraint type in the preferred routing order

options.name: -run_VSR_Script
options.description: User defined script to be executed by VSR

options.name: -share_shields
options.description: Used to enable the sharing of shields
